evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Quality, Testing & Monitoring: Writes tests (dbt tests, custom checks), implements basic data quality monitoring, and proactively investigates anomalies for the pipelines they own.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals dominate heavily (testing, monitoring, data quality, documentation, GDPR/PII, SOX awareness) versus a single 'fast-paced' mention in the benefits section, giving rigour by the 2x tie-breaker.
evidence.domain_risk: business areas served by the team (such as Finance, FP&A, Treasury, Procurement, Market Intelligence and others)... Awareness of Risk & Control / SOX concepts and how they apply to data and reporting.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role explicitly supports Finance, FP&A, Treasury, and Procurement with SOX/Risk & Control awareness called out, placing it in high domain risk due to financial reporting and compliance exposure.
evidence.collaboration_width: other Data Analytics Engineers; Reporting team; Business Analysts; Product Manager; Solutions Architect
evidence.data_team_maturity: operates as a fully independent contributor on data pipelines and data models of moderate complexity... within an established framework set by senior peers and the Solutions Architect.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A Center of Excellence model with named senior roles (Solutions Architect, Senior Engineers), an established team framework, and a full modern stack (Snowflake, dbt, Dagster, Terraform) all point to a mature, specialised data organization.
evidence.jd_authorship: Writes clean, testable Python—including object-oriented code—for Dagster assets, sensors and IO managers... Integrates data from a wide variety of sources (ERPs, transactional systems, SaaS tools, flat files, spreadsheets, etc.)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name precise tools, methodologies, and application context (Dagster assets/sensors/IO managers, Kimball, SOX, specific AWS services), clearly conveying what the person does day to day.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: business areas served by the team (such as Finance, FP&A, Treasury, Procurement, Market Intelligence and others)
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The team's served business areas are explicitly finance-oriented (Finance, FP&A, Treasury, Procurement), with SOX/Risk & Control awareness reinforcing a finance stakeholder audience.
evidence.autonomy_level: Delivers well-scoped pipelines and models end-to-end, with quality, under the guidance of senior peers.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role explicitly operates 'within an established framework set by senior peers and the Solutions Architect' and 'under the guidance of senior peers,' indicating scoped execution rather than strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role: Hands-on experience using AI / LLM-based tools to accelerate engineering work—code generation, code review, debugging, documentation, and data exploration—is a plus (*).
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to use AI tools to accelerate their own engineering work, matching the ai_user pattern; this is listed as a nice-to-have rather than a core AI-infrastructure responsibility.
evidence.testing_framing: Quality, Testing & Monitoring: Writes tests (dbt tests, custom checks), implements basic data quality monitoring, and proactively investigates anomalies for the pipelines they own.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and quality monitoring are a named responsibility owned by the candidate for the pipelines they build, using explicit ownership framing ('pipelines they own').
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Awareness of Risk & Control / SOX concepts and how they apply to data and reporting... Awareness of data privacy and security concepts (GDPR/PII).
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Repeated compliance and risk-control language (SOX, GDPR/PII, Risk & Control) throughout the requirements combined with finance-domain stakeholders indicates high loss aversion framing centered on regulatory and data-trust risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Builds and maintains data ingestion, transformation, and orchestration pipelines on Snowflake, dbt and Dagster... under established team standards
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role builds and maintains pipelines within an already-established framework and tooling standards, indicating fix/scale work rather than greenfield build.
evidence.language_gate: Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written).
evidence.work_arrangement: This role provides a hybrid way of working with an onsite presence of 2 days/week.
evidence.loss_aversion: "Awareness of Risk & Control / SOX concepts and how they apply to data and reporting" combined with Finance/FP&A/Treasury stakeholder framing signals a high emphasis on regulatory and data-trust risk.
